case_title: MARTHA I. REYES VS. JOSE ALEXANDER PALACIOS et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY REYES, MARTHA I. AS TO DEFENDANT PALACIOS, JOSE ALEXANDER AGUILUZ, NORA EBELIA AGUILUZ, IVONNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-06-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-06-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-06-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JOSE ALEXANDER PALACIOS, WHO WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT NORA AGUILUZ PRESENT. DEFENDANT IVONNE AGUILUZ NOT PRESENT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO IVONNE AGUILUZ BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-06-2010 AT 8:30AM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-06-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYES, MARTHA I. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALACIOS, JOSE ALEXANDER AGUILUZ, NORA EBELIA $3,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,650.00, PLAINTIFF SHALL RETURN TO DEFENDANTS ALL PROPERTY PLEDGED AS SECURITY, AS SET FORTH IN THE LOAN AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT IVONNE AGUILUZ DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE, UNTIMELY SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT PALACIOS, JOSE ALEXANDER MAILED TO RESPONDENT REYES, MARTHA I.

MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-21-2010 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY PALACIOS, JOSE ALEXANDER REYES, MARTHA I.
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-21-2010 - JUDGMENT ENTERED. CLERK - LESLIE GOMEZ, NOTHING ON RECORD, DEPT. 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT REYES, MARTHA I. RECOVER FROM APPELLANT PALACIOS, JOSE ALEXANDER $3,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $500.00 INTEREST, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,950.00, UPON PAYMENT OF THE DEBT, MS. REYES SHALL RETURN TO MR. PALACIOS THE CERTIFICATE OF TITLE PLUS JEWELRY HELD AS SECURITY FOR THE DEBT. NORA AGUILUZ IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-22-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 11:10am
Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, clerk-Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Jose A. Palacios appears in pro per. Respondent, Martha I. Reyes appears in pro per with friend who interprets Spanish.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and answer questions from Judge Renne.

Previous exhibits handed back to Respondent.

EXHR (1) one page document in Spanish, outlining loan agreement
EXHR (2) Pink slip to Appellants vehicle.

11:45am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-16-2010 Judgment Entered
